commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6edad6df49e83557dc7d5cf28bcb9fe8331953d0)
commands.review_summary:
The branch switches `openclaw capability audio providers` to media-understanding manifest metadata, adds control-plane filtering, and narrows cold media provider loading to configured media providers.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible: current main's audio provider listing calls the runtime media registry, which flows through plugin capability runtime loading. I did not run a live installed cold-start command because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for real CLI proof, and the patch needs maintainer-visible fixes for provider-listing parity before normal merge review can continue.

target.title: fix(media): avoid eager provider startup for audio listing
target.body:
## Summary
- list audio transcription providers from manifest metadata instead of constructing the runtime media-understanding registry
- apply control-plane plugin availability filtering to media-understanding manifest metadata
- narrow plugin capability provider loading to config-requested media providers when no active registry exists

## Why
`openclaw capability audio providers` only needs provider metadata for status/listing output. Building the runtime registry can eagerly load provider implementations and plugin code, which is slower and can trigger work unrelated to listing configured audio providers.

## Tests
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/cli/capability-cli.test.ts src/plugins/capability-provider-runtime.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/cli/capability-cli.ts src/cli/capability-cli.test.ts src/media-understanding/manifest-metadata.ts src/plugins/capability-provider-runtime.ts src/plugins/capability-provider-runtime.test.ts`
- `git diff --check -- src/cli/capability-cli.ts src/cli/capability-cli.test.ts src/media-understanding/manifest-metadata.ts src/plugins/capability-provider-runtime.ts src/plugins/capability-provider-runtime.test.ts`

## Hygiene
- committed with GitHub noreply author email
- staged only the five intended source/test files
- checked the staged diff for obvious credential patterns before committing
target.author: felixisaac
